query.text: select stt_rec_tt, sum(tt_qd) as tt_qd into #v from @@prime$partition$current where stt_rec = @stt_rec group by stt_rec_tt select @@fieldExternal from @@prime$partition$current a left join dmtk b on a.tk_no = b.tk left join cttt30 d on a.stt_rec_tt = d.stt_rec left join m52$$partition$current e on a.stt_rec = e.stt_rec left join #v f on a.stt_rec_tt = f.stt_rec_tt where a.stt_rec = @stt_rec order by a.line_nbr

action.text: if exists(select 1 from dmthue where ma_thue = @ma_thue) begin select a.thue_suat, rtrim(a.tk_thue_no3) as tk_thue_no, b.tk_cn from dmthue a left join dmtk b on a.tk_thue_no3 = b.tk where a.ma_thue = @ma_thue return end
if exists(select 1 from dmtk where tk = @tk_thue and loai_tk = 1) select tk_cn from dmtk where tk = @tk_thue else select 0 as tk_cn return

declare @unitCode varchar(32), @voucherNumber varchar(32), @payID varchar(32) select @unitCode = case when @$ma_dvcs = '' then @@unit else @$ma_dvcs end, @voucherNumber = dbo.ff_PadL(@so_hd, col_length('cttt30', 'so_ct')) if exists(select 1 from cttt30 where ma_dvcs = @unitCode and ma_kh = @$ma_kh and ngay_ct <= @$ngay_lct and loai_tt = 0 and stt_rec = @stt_rec_tt and so_ct = @voucherNumber) select @payID = @stt_rec_tt else select top 1 @payID = stt_rec from cttt30 where ma_dvcs = @unitCode and ma_kh = @$ma_kh and ngay_ct <= @$ngay_lct and loai_tt = 0 and (tat_toan = 0 or (stt_rec in (select stt_rec_tt from cttt30 where stt_rec = @$stt_rec and loai_tt = 1))) and so_ct = @voucherNumber order by stt_rec if @payID is not null begin declare @c numeric(22, 4) select @c = sum(tt_qd) from cttt30 where stt_rec = @$stt_rec and stt_rec_tt = @payID select rtrim(a.tk) as tk, b.ten_tk%l as ten_tk, a.ngay_ct, case when isnull(a.ma_nt, '') = '' then (select val from options where name = 'm_ma_nt0') else a.ma_nt end as ma_nt, a.ty_gia, case when a.ma_nt = '' then a.t_tt else a.t_tt_nt end as tien_hd_nt, a.t_tt_qd - isnull(@c, 0) as da_tt_nt, case when a.ma_nt = '' then a.t_tt else a.t_tt_nt end - (a.t_tt_qd - isnull(@c, 0)) as cl_nt, rtrim(ma_vv) as ma_vv, rtrim(ma_bp) as ma_bp, rtrim(so_lsx) as so_lsx, rtrim(ma_sp) as ma_sp, rtrim(ma_hd) as ma_hd, rtrim(ma_phi) as ma_phi, rtrim(ma_ku) as ma_ku from cttt30 a left join dmtk b on a.tk = b.tk where a.stt_rec = @payID return end
